runbooks.title: Payments API latency triage
steps: Compare p95 latency between phx and iad.
If p95 latency is above 700 ms for 10 minutes, page commerce-platform.
Open a customer-impact bridge when more than one incident is active.

runbooks.title: Fraud Scoring watch procedure
steps: Escalate only when status changes from watch to degraded.

policies.name: Customer escalation policy
policies.rule: For tier-1 commerce services, two or more active incidents require a customer-impact bridge and an executive summary.

policies.name: AI generated action policy
policies.rule: AI assistants may recommend operational actions, but paging, ticket closure, and customer notifications require human approval.
